design_philosophy: Clean, clear, and simple. Functional first, with high contrast for readability. The UI must inspire trust and authority while remaining highly accessible to users of varying technical proficiency. Content spacing is dense but structured, ensuring data heavy screens remain scannable.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned for all tabular data and forms. Center alignment reserved for empty states or specialized login cards.

cards.style: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E4D8C] hover:bg-[#163A6A] text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-[#1E4D8C] hover:bg-blue-50 font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.style: w-full border-gray-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:border-[#1E4D8C] focus:ring-[#1E4D8C] sm:text-sm text-gray-900

tables.header: bg-gray-50 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider

badges.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

sidebar.style: w-64 bg-white border-r border-gray-200 h-screen flex flex-col hidden md:flex
sidebar.link: flex items-center px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-colors text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-900
sidebar.link_active: flex items-center px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-colors bg-blue-50 text-[#1E4D8C]

logo.description: Full SLA logo, use in header and login screen.

background.description: Background image (Sfondo), use for the login page right/left split screen or as a subtle app background if needed.

accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have visible hover states altering background or border.
accessibility_and_interactions.focus_states: Focus rings must be clearly visible, using ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#1E4D8C].
accessibility_and_interactions.contrast: Text contrast must meet WCAG AA standards. Avoid light gray text on white backgrounds.
accessibility_and_interactions.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-reimbursement-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust dashboard layout with a responsive sidebar navigation (hidden on mobile, replaced by a hamburger menu in a top nav).
Implement Shadcn UI components for Tables, Forms (Inputs, Select, DatePicker), Dialogs, Tabs, and Dropdowns. Ensure all are styled with the provided color palette.
The primary font 'Manrope' should be used for all headers, and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Install these via Google Fonts in index.html or global CSS.
On the Login page, create a split-screen design. Left side: Form with the logo (9qoxl0rw_Full logo.png). Right side: The background image (vtzwwkoa_SfondoSLA.png) covering the full height.
For the reimbursement form (Richiesta Rimborso), use clear multi-column layouts for complex data entry, ensuring logical grouping of fields (e.g., Personal Info, Expenses, Uploads).
Use badges to represent states in the Tabella Rimborsi (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) mapped to the status colors in this JSON.
Do NOT use transparent headers over scrollable content. Headers must have a solid white background with a bottom border.
Ensure data-testid attributes are aggressively applied to forms, buttons, and navigation links to enable testing.
